title: MAS to boost Singapore equities market with education, guardrails and a risk‑taking framework
body: MAS deputy chairman Chee Hong Tat announced increased resources for public and investor education, new guardrails and a more risk‑taking approach to revive Singapore’s equities market, while emphasizing transparency, shareholder engagement and stronger enforcement. He also responded to Workers’ Party proposals, noting that some value‑creation disclosures may become mandatory but stressing that not all measures should be prescribed.
